subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses unto a people who perceive that they are the Decisive Word between His servants. Blessed are they [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات لقوم یشعرون انها لفصل الخطاب بین العباد طوبی لقوم
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
